note.purpose: Not documented this pass — color + shape scope only. See _text.scss.

shadows.name: accordion-splitted
shadows.purpose: Hairline lift on splitted accordion items.

shadows.name: accordion-shadow
shadows.purpose: Defined lift on the shadow accordion variant. The system ceiling — never exceed 8px blur.

motion.name: field-focus
motion.purpose: Input/select label and border focus transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Highest-emphasis action. Brand orange fill, one per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-width: 140px; padding: 10px 20px; border: 2px solid #FF5B00; border-radius: 20px; background: #FF5B00; color: #FFFFFF; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #D44E00; border-color: #D44E00; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF5B00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-width: 140px; padding: 10px 20px; border: 2px solid #2A2521; border-radius: 20px; background: #2A2521; color: #FFFFFF; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #000000; border-color: #000000; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2A2521; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Flat Button
components.css: .ds-btn-flat { min-width: 140px; padding: 10px 20px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 20px; background: transparent; color: #FF5B00; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-flat:hover { background: rgba(255,91,0,0.08); color: #D44E00; } .ds-btn-flat:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF5B00; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Primary Input
components.description: Text field with the signature orange focus border.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; max-width: 360px; } .ds-field span { color: #242424; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; } .ds-input { padding: 10px 14px; border: 2px solid #C9C5BF; border-radius: 10px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #242424; font-size: 15px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6E6E6E; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: #FF5B00; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #FF5B00; }

components.name: Accordion Item
components.description: Collapsible item; border turns orange when open.
components.css: .ds-accordion { border: 1px solid #E4E0DB; border-radius: 8px; background: #F2F2F2; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-accordion:hover { border-color: #B0ABA4; } .ds-accordion-trigger { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; padding: 16px 20px; background: transparent; border: none; color: #242424; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; } .ds-accordion-ind { color: #FF5B00; }

narrative.overview: One color does the talking. The Citrica web base is a warm-neutral canvas with a single, unmistakable voice — brand orange #FF5B00 — applied with the precision of an engineered tool. The reference is Linear: sharp, restrained, confident. Orange appears exactly where attention should go and almost nowhere else. The system rejects the generic Bootstrap admin and the unstyled HeroUI demo; this pass removed the gold buttons, purple secondaries, cyan tertiaries, blue focus rings, and acid-lime calendars that had drifted in. If a color isn't orange, a warm neutral, or a semantic signal, it does not belong here.
keyCharacteristics: Single chromatic accent (brand orange); secondary and tertiary are deliberately neutral.
Warm-neutral grays for every surface, outline, and field — never cool, never default-Material.
Interactive focus is always orange, across inputs, selects, textareas, and calendars.
Tactile but tight shape: 20px pill buttons, 10px fields, 8px accordions, crisp 2px field borders.
Accessibility-first contrast on text and placeholders; no decorative light-gray.

rules.name: The One-Accent Rule
rules.body: Orange is the only chromatic color. Secondary is ink, tertiary is taupe, semantics are signals — none is a 'brand color #2'. Two competing accents means one is wrong.

rules.name: The Orange-Focus Rule
rules.body: Every interactive focus/hover border — input, select, textarea, calendar cell — is orange. Focus is brand expression. Blue focus rings are forbidden.

rules.name: The No-Material-Leftover Rule
rules.body: Purple (#6B3FA0, #4F378B), gold (#D4AF37), cyan (#00FFFF), and acid lime (#E1FF00) are banned on sight — the HeroUI/Material defaults this system replaces.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Separation is a border or tonal step, not a drop shadow. Shadows appear only where a component lifts, never above 8px blur.

dos: Do spend orange (#FF5B00) on one thing per view — the primary action or the focused element.
Do make every focus and hover border orange across inputs, selects, textareas, and calendars.
Do use ink (#2A2521) for the secondary button and any second emphasis; keep secondary/tertiary neutral.
Do keep body text at #242424 and placeholders at #6E6E6E or darker — verified contrast, never decorative light gray.
Do hold the shape scale: 20px pill buttons, 10px fields, 8px accordions.
Do deepen orange to #D44E00 for hover/pressed — same hue, darker, never a new color.
donts: Don't reintroduce the Material/HeroUI leftovers: purple #6B3FA0/#4F378B, gold #D4AF37, cyan #00FFFF, acid lime #E1FF00, blue focus #265197.
Don't let the surface read as a generic Bootstrap admin — no default-blue, no boxy gray card grids.
Don't put white text on orange at body-copy size (~3:1); fine only for button/large/bold text.
Don't use a second chromatic accent. One screen, one orange.
Don't round cards past 16px or fields past their 10px token; pill is for buttons and tags only.
Don't pair a 1px border with a soft wide drop shadow, or push any shadow past 8px blur.
